summary: Added (c *Client) IsCached(path, params) bool to expose the 5-minute HTTP-cache hit signal.
reason: Commands that fan out many requests (coin pop-curve initially; coin batch and others in the future) need a public hit-probe to compute accurate live-call counts before fan-out. The cacheKey/readCache machinery already existed as private methods; this wraps them in a single bool query. Companion patch to pop-curve-cache-probe.
